title: RPG Locator Bar
description: Makes the locator bar separate from the XP bar and High up like popular RPG's!
body:
# RPG Locator Bar

This mod separates the Locator Bar from the XP Bar, moving it higher on the screen similar to popular RPG-style HUDs. The XP bar and locator bar no longer fight for the same space, and their behavior can be fully customized through in-game settings.

![Screenshot showing how the locator bar is positioned](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f971f371a5796cc284982ead8ce798071377f5b.jpeg)
## Features

- Separates the locator bar from the XP bar
  
- Adjustable vertical positioning for the locator bar
  
- Optional XP bar visibility while the locator is active
 
- RPG-style HUD behavior without replacing vanilla mechanics

## Configuration Options

![Screenshot showing the configurable options in the Mod Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8aa8ae3dfc3438d73507bbbe926cfc965dd608b7.jpeg)

All settings are available in-game and can be changed at any time, either through the Mod Menu (Fabric requires [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for this feature) or via a configurable keybind.

### Locator Bar Vertical Offset

Adjusts how high the locator bar appears on the screen.


```
default = 0
```


Can be raised all the way to the top of the screen to as low down as the XP bar.

### Render XP Overlay with Locator

Controls whether the XP bar is visible while the locator bar is active.


```
On (default): XP bar remains visible when the locator bar is shown

Off: XP bar is hidden while the locator bar is on screen
```


### Hide XP Bar in Creative

Controls XP bar visibility in Creative mode.


```
On (default): XP bar is hidden in Creative mode, matching vanilla behavior

Off: XP bar is visible in Creative mode
```


### Keep Locator During XP Gain

Controls whether the locator bar stays visible while gaining experience.


```
On (default): Locator bar remains visible while XP is gained

Off: Locator bar is hidden while gaining XP
```


### Locator Bar Always On

Controls whether the locator bar is situational or always visible.


```
Off (default): Locator bar only appears when something can be located

On: Locator bar is always visible, even with no active targets
```


### Default Settings Button

Instantly resets all settings back to their default values
